---
title: "I want practical tools and resources"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: practical-tools
    contents: tools/posts
    type: grid
    include:
      categories: "*setup*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    grid-columns: 2
  - id: practical-reading
    contents: tools/posts
    type: grid
    include:
      categories: "*books*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    grid-columns: 2
  - id: practical-guidance
    contents: guidance/posts
    type: default
    include:
      categories: "*workflow*"
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.story-hero}
This pathway gathers practical content tagged for **setup**, **books**, and **workflow** so you can move quickly from planning into implementation.
:::

## Tools and setup notes

:::{#practical-tools}
:::

## Recommended reading

:::{#practical-reading}
:::

## Workflow guidance to support implementation

:::{#practical-guidance}
:::

[Back to the homepage](index.qmd)
